Pricing.noSubscriptionsText: Every template is a single, one-time payment via crypto — that's the whole pricing model.

Testimonials.title: A Small, Honest Alternative
Testimonials.description: No bloated subscription plans and no fake customer counts — just real templates and a straightforward, one-time price.
Testimonials.reason1Text: Every template ships as a complete Next.js project you can clone and run locally in minutes — not a static mockup.
Testimonials.reason2Text: No subscriptions, no recurring fees. Pay once via crypto and the template is yours to keep, forever.
Testimonials.reason3Text: Nexora Core is a small, independently run marketplace — built and maintained by someone who actually uses these templates.

TemplatesPage.title: Browse Templates
TemplatesPage.description: Premium Next.js templates crafted for startups, agencies and modern SaaS products.

PricingPage.title: One template, one price
PricingPage.description: No subscriptions and no hidden tiers. Pick a template, pay once, and it's yours — with lifetime updates and a commercial license included.
PricingPage.cryptoOnlyText: Every purchase is a one-time payment sent to a wallet address during checkout, confirmed manually. No recurring charges, ever.

DocsPage.title: Getting started
DocsPage.description: Everything you need to go from purchase to a running, customized site.
DocsPage.step1Body: Choose a template from the marketplace and complete checkout. Payment is a one-time crypto payment, confirmed manually — there's no subscription.
DocsPage.step2Body: Once your payment is confirmed, the template's full source code is unlocked in your dashboard under "My Purchases."
DocsPage.step3Body: Unzip the project, then run npm install (or your package manager of choice) inside the project folder to install all dependencies.
DocsPage.step4Body: Run npm run dev and open http://localhost:3000 to see the template running on your machine.
DocsPage.step5Body: Update the content, colors, and copy to match your brand, then deploy to any platform that supports Next.js.
DocsPage.templateDocsText: Each template also ships with its own README covering its specific folder structure and configuration.
DocsPage.faq1Q: Do I need a Next.js or React background?
DocsPage.faq1A: Basic familiarity with React and Tailwind CSS helps, but every template ships with clear component names and structure so non-experts can still make simple edits.
DocsPage.faq2Q: Can I use a template for client projects?
DocsPage.faq2A: Yes. Every purchase includes a commercial license, so you can use the template in your own projects or client work.
DocsPage.faq3A: No. All future updates to a template you've purchased are included at no extra cost.
DocsPage.faq4A: Reach out through the contact details on the checkout confirmation, and we'll help you get unblocked.

ContactPage.title: Get in touch
ContactPage.description: Questions about a template, a purchase, or anything else? Send a message and you'll hear back by email.
ContactPage.sentTitle: Message sent — thanks for reaching out.
ContactPage.sentText: You should hear back by email soon.
ContactPage.errorText: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again in a moment.

Legal.privacyDescription: Last updated July 2026. This describes, in plain language, what information Nexora Core collects and how it's used.
Legal.privacyDisclaimer: This policy describes how the site currently works and isn't a substitute for legal advice. If you have specific compliance requirements, have it reviewed by a legal professional.
Legal.privacy1Body: Account details (your name and email) and your list of purchased templates are currently stored locally in your browser, not in a company database. This means they stay on the device and browser you signed in with, and won't follow you to a different device or browser.
Legal.privacy2Body: We do not collect or store card numbers, bank details, or wallet private keys. Checkout works by sending a crypto payment to a published wallet address, then clicking a confirmation button. That confirmation is currently sent to us by email so we can verify the payment and follow up with you.
Legal.privacy3Body: If you use the contact form, your name, email, and message are sent to us by email so we can reply to you. We don't store contact form submissions in a database beyond that email.
Legal.privacy4Body: We do not currently use cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party analytics on this site.
Legal.privacy5Body: We use Resend, an email delivery service, to send account and purchase-related emails. We do not sell or share your information with advertisers.
Legal.privacy6Body: Because your account and purchase data live in your browser's local storage, you can clear them at any time by clearing your browser's site data for this domain. If you'd like us to delete any information you've sent us by email (for example, through the contact form), reach out on the contact page.
Legal.termsDescription: Last updated July 2026. These terms apply whenever you purchase or use a template from Nexora Core.
Legal.termsDisclaimer: These terms are a general starting point and aren't a substitute for legal advice. If you have specific legal or regulatory requirements, have them reviewed by a legal professional.
Legal.terms1Body: Each purchase gives you a license to use the purchased template's source code in your own personal or commercial projects, including projects built for clients. You may modify the code freely.
Legal.terms2Body: You may not resell, redistribute, or sublicense a template's source code as a standalone product or template — for example, uploading it to another template marketplace. You may not claim authorship of the original template design.
Legal.terms3Body: Payment is currently accepted as a one-time cryptocurrency payment sent to the wallet address shown at checkout. Purchases are verified manually rather than automatically, so there may be a short delay between payment and confirmation.
Legal.terms4Body: Because templates are digital goods delivered as source code, all sales are final once a purchase is confirmed and delivered. If a template doesn't work as described, reach out through the contact page and we'll do our best to resolve it.
Legal.terms5Body: Purchased templates include free access to future updates released for that template, for as long as the template remains part of the catalog.
Legal.terms6Body: Templates are provided "as is," without warranty of any kind. We aren't liable for damages arising from the use of a purchased template.
Legal.terms7Body: These terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the site after a change means you accept the updated terms.

AboutPage.title: Building templates we'd actually want to use
AboutPage.description: Nexora Core is a small marketplace of premium Next.js templates and UI components.
AboutPage.card1Body: Every template on Nexora Core is built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, designed to be readable and easy to customize rather than over-engineered. Each one ships with clean component names, a consistent folder structure, and lifetime updates.
AboutPage.card2Body: Payments are currently accepted as a one-time crypto payment, confirmed manually. There are no subscriptions — buy a template once and it's yours, along with any future updates.
AboutPage.card3BodyPart1: Nexora Core is an early-stage, independently run project. The template catalog and component library are actively growing. If you run into an issue or have feedback, the
AboutPage.card3BodyPart2: is the fastest way to reach us.

ComponentsPage.title: Built with these components
ComponentsPage.description: A live look at the UI primitives that power every Nexora Core template — the same Button, Card, and form components you'll get in the code.

ComponentsPage.inputDesc: Form input with focus ring and placeholder styling.
ComponentsPage.cardDesc: The base surface used across dashboards, pricing, and product pages.
ComponentsPage.cardDemoBody: Any content can live inside a Card.
ComponentsPage.featureCardDesc: Card + icon slot, used for feature grids.
ComponentsPage.featureCardDemoDesc: Optimized for Core Web Vitals out of the box.
ComponentsPage.tabsDesc: Used on template detail pages for overview, reviews, FAQ, and changelog.
ComponentsPage.tabsDetailsContent: Switch tabs to see this change.
ComponentsPage.moreComponents: More components (Modal, Avatar, Stat Card, Tag, and more) are in active development and will show up here as they ship.
